tools.name: search
tools.description: Search public WeJob jobs, formations, and companies. Returns ids usable with fetch.

tools.name: fetch
tools.description: Fetch a public WeJob item by id. Supported id prefixes: job:, formation:, company:.

tools.name: wejob_search_jobs
tools.description: Search public active WeJob job offers.

tools.name: wejob_get_job
tools.description: Fetch one public active WeJob job offer by public id.

tools.name: wejob_get_formation
tools.description: Fetch one public active WeJob formation by public id.

tools.name: wejob_get_company
tools.description: Fetch one public WeJob company profile by public id.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "fetch" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.
